cases.subject: EC2 instance unreachable after security group change

communications.body: We are unable to reach our EC2 instance i-0abc123def456789 via SSH after modifying the security group. The instance status checks are passing.
Thank you for contacting AWS Support. I can see the security group sg-0123456789abcdef was modified to remove the SSH inbound rule. Please re-add port 22 access from your IP range.

cases.subject: RDS Multi-AZ failover causing brief connection drops

communications.body: Our application experienced brief connection drops during what appears to be an RDS Multi-AZ failover. We need to understand why the failover occurred.
